main.name: Vox Zen
main.bio: I'm Zen, an independent developer behind Vox Zen. I build backend systems, AI integrations, and communication platforms. My work focuses on practical products such as CPaaS solutions, Discord bots, and scalable web applications, with a strong emphasis on automation and real-world utility.

projects.title: CPaaS Mini [Published]
projects.about: A scalable CPaaS platform powered by Azure Communication Services and AWS Amazon Connect, supporting voice automation, call handling, and real-time communication systems.

projects.title: Discord AI Assistant Bot [Published]
projects.about: An AI-powered Discord assistant built using OpenAI and ElevenLabs. Supports conversational AI, voice interaction, and automation features for community management.

projects.title: Roblox Game (Beta) [Published]
projects.about: A game developed using Roblox Studio and Lua scripting. Focused on gameplay mechanics and interactive player experience.

projects.title: Discord Game Bot [In Progress]
projects.about: A Discord bot currently in development focused on game features, player interaction, and community engagement systems.

projects.title: Online Shop Web App [In Progress]
projects.about: An e-commerce web application with Stripe payment gateway integration. Includes product management, checkout system, and secure payment handling.

testimonials.text: Alex's technical expertise and problem-solving abilities are outstanding. They transformed our entire infrastructure and reduced costs by 40%.
Working with Alex was a game-changer for our team. Their code quality and architectural decisions set new standards for our organization.
